title: The Ark Maxim Starts Moving
description: Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Aisa, Nami, Wyper. Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: This ain't the time to sleep!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Ahhh! Now I remember! God! God appeared!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: He's not here now! He already left!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: A ship... On top of the forest?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But Nami took off her T-shirt!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: I can hardly grasp our situation...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Where's Comis? Or the weird old knight!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Of course! You've got that thing, don'cha?

summary: Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.
